## Validation

- [ ] CMake configure/build
- [ ] CTest
- [ ] `python scripts/check_repo_clean.py .`

## Checklist

- [ ] No local absolute paths
- [ ] No large generated artifacts
- [ ] No raw datasets
- [ ] No mandatory CUDA/FCL/Python dependency added
- [ ] Limitations documented honestly
